target.title: Polish Workboard operations view
target.body:
## Summary
- polish Workboard card layout, timestamps, density controls, detail drawer behavior, mobile modal/dropdown behavior, and tooltip handling
- add health summary badge highlighting, filter-aware views, stable card action slots, card-derived agent filter options, and better empty states
- add guarded Workboard auto-refresh with dispatch-safe refresh sequencing, stale refresh protection, and disconnect cleanup
- fix Workboard lint issues from the custom dropdown and health-filter changes

## Change breakdown

### Workboard controls and refresh behavior
- Stabilized the toolbar so refresh state, auto-refresh, dispatch, density toggle, archive toggle, and last-updated time do not jump around during refreshes.
- Made the last-updated display a stable timestamp instead of switching between transient refresh text and time text.
- Hid the manual Refresh button while auto-refresh is enabled to reduce repeated visual state changes.
- Kept Dispatch ready work available during refresh when the action itself is still valid.
- Added guarded refresh sequencing so stale refresh responses do not overwrite newer Workboard state.

### Card layout and details
- Added per-card updated timestamps with local browser-time rendering.
- Reworked card headers so actions, timestamps, and chips use stable positions across density modes.
- Made card action slots consistent so buttons do not jump as density or content changes.
- Changed compact timestamp copy to use the clock icon plus date/time instead of truncating `Updated: ...`.
- Updated the details drawer to show matching date and time precision.
- Made clicking the already-selected card close the details drawer.

### Health metrics and highlighting
- Added the Workboard health metric bar for running, blocked, stale, ready unassigned, missing proof, and failed attempts.
- Made metric badges interactive: clicking a metric highlights matching cards.
- Matched highlight colors to the selected metric instead of always using red.
- Highlighted the active metric badge so the current metric selection is visible.
- Blended selected-card side color into the highlighted border so the card treatment looks intentional.
- Made health counts derive from live card/task/session state instead of manual labels.

### Filtering and dropdowns
- Replaced inconsistent native/custom filter dropdown behavior with a shared Workboard select control.
- Made selecting one dropdown close the previously open dropdown.
- Capitalized priority labels for consistency.
- Disabled zero-result view preset options where appropriate and added an empty-state message for no-result filters.
- Made status/view filters hide zero-result columns so filtered views are useful.
- Limited single-column filtered layouts on desktop instead of stretching one column across the full screen.
- Improved agent filter/assignment options by deduping configured agents, default/unassigned agent handling, and card-assignee-derived agents.

### Tooltips and icons
- Replaced unclear density icons with clearer list/dense-layout icons.
- Added tooltips across Workboard icon buttons.
- Reduced tooltip delay globally for Workboard buttons.
- Restored the compact one-line tooltip style and fixed tooltip clipping/overlap issues.
- Suppressed hover tooltips on mobile detail interactions where they obscure the fullscreen panel.

### Mobile and responsive behavior
- Fixed mobile horizontal overflow so cards fit within the board container without x-scroll.
- Restored card visibility after the mobile column/layout adjustment.
- Made the new-card modal fullscreen on mobile and larger on desktop.
- Fixed mobile dropdown placement inside the new-card modal.
- Changed modal dropdown menus to overlay instead of consuming layout real estate.
- Made mobile details open as a fullscreen panel.

### New card and demo data flows
- Improved the new-card modal layout to avoid nested vertical scroll problems.
- Added Workboard CLI/demo proof data for live boards, including seeded cards across statuses except Running.
- Added and duplicated demo card batches for the requested agents/boards during validation.

### Tests, i18n, and CI
- Added/updated Workboard controller, view, tooltip, lifecycle, settings, and E2E coverage.
- Regenerated Control UI i18n outputs for the new Workboard strings.
- Fixed CI lint issues from the custom dropdown and health-filter changes.
- Updated PR proof with live Workboard CLI output so the real-behavior proof gate passes.

## Verification
- `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts` - 79 tests passed, including the regression for clearing stale task summaries after dispatch task refresh failure.
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/dom-tooltips.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-settings.refresh-active-tab.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-lifecycle.node.test.ts` - 5 files, 184 tests passed.
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH pnpm ui:i18n:check`
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts`
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` - first run found the stale task-summary dispatch issue; after commit `b89813ccc6f6c8517160d65d7ec30bc242cf17df`, rerun was clean with no accepted/actionable findings.
- Current branch proof was run at head `b89813ccc6f6c8517160d65d7ec30bc242cf17df` against current `upstream/main` `9827490f5f735a567716f128ffcdb892d9d39324`.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Workboard operations view layout, filters, health badges, tooltip-safe card actions, custom dropdowns, edit/create modals, drag/reload flow, read-only behavior, guarded auto-refresh, diagnostics refresh on writable tab load, stale-base CI failures, and stale task-summary cleanup when dispatch relists cards but task enrichment fails.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw PR branch at head `b89813ccc6f6c8517160d65d7ec30bc242cf17df`, reviewed and diff-checked against current `upstream/main` `9827490f5f735a567716f128ffcdb892d9d39324`, using the real local Workboard plugin state plus focused deterministic Workboard/UI tests.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```sh
pnpm openclaw --version
pnpm openclaw plugins list --enabled --json | node -e '<summarize enabled Workboard plugin>'
pnpm openclaw workboard list --json | node -e '<summarize live card statuses without printing card contents>'
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/dom-tooltips.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-settings.refresh-active-tab.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-lifecycle.node.test.ts
pnpm ui:i18n:check
pnpm tsgo:test:ui
node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high
```

Evidence after fix: Terminal output from the real OpenClaw CLI on current head `b89813c`:
```text
$ pnpm openclaw --version
OpenClaw 2026.6.2 (b89813c)

$ pnpm openclaw plugins list --enabled --json | node -e '<summarize enabled Workboard plugin>'
{
  "enabledCount": 80,
  "workboard": {
    "id": "workboard",
    "enabled": true
  }
}

$ pnpm openclaw workboard list --json | node -e '<summarize live card statuses without printing card contents>'
{
  "cardCount": 10,
  "statuses": {
    "triage": 1,
    "backlog": 1,
    "todo": 1,
    "scheduled": 1,
    "ready": 3,
    "review": 1,
    "blocked": 1,
    "done": 1
  },
  "readyByAgent": {
    "main": 2,
    "gadget": 1
  }
}
```

Linked visual proof from the Chromium Workboard E2E artifact set:
- Create dialog screenshot: https://files.catbox.moe/3oczzf.png
- Edited card screenshot: https://files.catbox.moe/4b90q2.png
- Lifecycle review screenshot: https://files.catbox.moe/anspcb.png
- Read-only board screenshot: https://files.catbox.moe/21bnki.png
- Drag/status persistence screenshot: https://files.catbox.moe/ggu4pd.png
- Writable flow recording: https://files.catbox.moe/1asjze.webm

Observed result after fix: The live Workboard plugin is enabled and the real Workboard CLI lists cards across expected non-running statuses, including three Ready cards for dispatch/view validation. The dispatch controller now clears cached task summaries before attempting post-dispatch task enrichment, so a task-ledger failure can record `lastRefreshError` without reusing stale task state against the freshly listed cards. The local CLI also reported a config-version mismatch and plugin index migration warnings for the existing local state; those warnings did not block Workboard plugin discovery or card listing. Focused Workboard tests, UI typecheck, i18n check, formatting check, diff whitespace check, and branch autoreview all pass on pushed head `b89813ccc6f6c8517160d65d7ec30bc242cf17df`.

What was not tested: A live production Gateway with private user data was not dumped in the PR; live proof summarizes plugin/card state without printing card contents or secrets. Full CI is rerunning on pushed head `b89813ccc6f6c8517160d65d7ec30bc242cf17df`.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
